item.title: KATSEYE Put Their ‘Pinky Up’ and Go Hard in the Club in Video For Hyper Pop New Single: Watch
item.description:
[Upbeat music plays in the background]
Host: "Hey there, K-pop fans. Get ready for some exciting news. HYBE girl group KATSEYE just dropped their brand new single, 'Pink Up', and it's a beat-crazy track that's sure to get you moving. The song is particularly special because it's the first one without OG member Manon Bannerman, who's currently on temporary hiatus focusing on her health and well-being."
[Clip of "Pink Up" plays]
Host: "The hyper-pop song features fierce vocals from members Dani...
